description.value: Price 12,500 gp; Slot eyes; CL 3rd; Weight —; Aura faint abjuration DESCRIPTION Commonly used by thugs, these dark-tinted lenses make the wearer appear threatening. The wearer gains a +2 competence bonus on Intimidate checks. Intelligent creatures find the wearer hard to read; the wearer is treated as if affected by a constant undetectable alignment spell, making her true motives difficult to ascertain. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,250 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells undetectable alignment
